response.overview: Shy Latte is the story of Sara, a shy young woman, who finds a pair of magical headphones that allow her to read the thoughts of those around her. The only catch is everyone starts singing their own thoughts in a style of music that does not always correlate with their appearance. Could the magical headphones give her insights into her crush, the cute barista, Gavin?
response.title: A young woman finds a pair of magical headphones that help her overcome her shyness
